title: MikroTik ACSMAUFL Pigtail, 15cm, U.FL - SMA female
description: U.fl-SMA female pigtail, that can be used to connect your LTE card to an external antenna if you are using wAP R kit (there are special openings in the enclosure of the wAP R, designed for these pigtails)
